tasks.label: inspect-venv-processes
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*\.venv*' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List

tasks.label: kill-kernels-and-remove-venvs
tasks.command: $pids = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'python.exe' -and ($_.CommandLine -like '*\.venv\*' -or $_.CommandLine -like '*\.venv-1\*') } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty ProcessId; if ($pids) { Stop-Process -Id $pids -Force }; Remove-Item -LiteralPath @('.venv','.venv-1') -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output 'removed venv folders'

tasks.label: recheck-venv-processes
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'python.exe' -and ($_.CommandLine -like '*\.venv*') } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List

tasks.label: delete-venv1
tasks.command: Set-Location 'D:\one drivee\OneDrive\Desktop\Final data sc'; Remove-Item -LiteralPath '.venv-1' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output 'removed .venv-1'
